title: Pilot shell and parcel intake on clean main
summary: User story: As a Moore Bass Project Manager, Land Planner, or Civil PM, I can start a pilot project from a parcel ID or address inside a dedicated pilot runtime instead of a generic chat.
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated `/pilot` shell exists on clean `main`.
`/pilot/project` captures parcel ID, address, and project scope.
`project`, `parcel`, and `jurisdiction` persist separately from generic chats.
Pilot project context can launch and reuse the existing chat/runner stack.
[Screen 02 - Pilot Home Dashboard](<https://www.notion.so/3182cb8d0fb4818c8f4fd32a892f22a8>): canonical visual for the `/pilot` landing shell, dashboard cards, and blocked-work framing.
[Screen 03 - New Pilot Project Setup](<https://www.notion.so/3182cb8d0fb481969088c2e2b13f1a8d>): canonical visual for parcel, address, and project-scope intake.
startupCommand: if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; fi; pnpm ui:dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173
relevantScreens: Screen 02: Moore Bass 02 - Pilot Home Dashboard
Validated jurisdictions, needs revalidation, blocked source families, active pilot projects, upcoming reviews, and discovery-first dashboard guidance.
Screen 03: Moore Bass 03 - New Pilot Project Setup
Parcel ID, address, project type, inferred jurisdiction, objective/checklist choices, and Create Project & Discover Sources action.

notionPages.title: Construction Knowledge Platform Storyboard Hub
notionPages.summary: This hub tracks the active discovery-first Moore Bass pilot corpus and the supporting historical reference material.

notionPages.title: Moore Bass 02 - Pilot Home Dashboard
notionPages.summary: Establishes the product as an operating dashboard for jurisdiction source health, not a frozen pilot shell.

notionPages.title: Moore Bass 03 - New Pilot Project Setup
notionPages.summary: Frames the project as a scoped jurisdiction discovery run instead of a dataset selection step.
